title: Claude Code Skills Pack: User Story Writing — 5 Skills for Turning Requirements Into Actionable Tickets
description: For product managers and business analysts, this pack converts raw feature requests into well-structured user stories, acceptance criteria, edge case lists, definition-of-done checklists, and Jira-ready ticket descriptions so they can eliminate ambiguity before development starts
gumroad_description:
CLAUDE CODE SKILLS PACK: USER STORY WRITING

Your feature requests are a mess of half-thoughts, contradictions, and missing edge cases—and developers are spinning their wheels asking clarifying questions instead of building.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Product managers juggling 50 slack messages into something coherent
— Business analysts tired of writing descriptions that get ignored
— Tech leads who can't ship because specs are too vague

WHAT'S INSIDE

— Story structure skill: Convert vague ideas into "As a [user], I want [feature], so that [outcome]" format with zero ambiguity
— Acceptance criteria skill: Build testable conditions developers actually use instead of ignore
— Edge case skill: Spot hidden failure modes before they ship to production
— Definition-of-done skill: Create checkpoints so work doesn't slip through acceptance
— Jira formatting skill: Write ticket descriptions that Claude can parse, developers can execute, QA can verify

Drop these 5 SKILL.md files into your Claude skills folder and start converting raw requirements into bulletproof tickets today.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
